standing_authorization: BATCH-38-SPECIFIC, operator AskUserQuestion 2026-07-12 at kickoff. RUN MODE = 'Autonomous + self-merge' WITH ONE OPERATOR REFINEMENT (verbatim): 'Yes, record all autonomous decisions as your first response states. But only ask me to approve the plan.' INTERPRETATION: the agent runs ALL phase gates + increment gates autonomously (full review packets in-conversation at each, self-approving with a named exit-criteria axis check), NO stop-for-approval at gates EXCEPT the single Phase-0 PLAN APPROVAL gate (operator explicitly wants to approve the plan before execution). MERGE AUTHORITY GRANTED (self-merge): after PR opened + CI green, a FINAL independent PR-level qa-reviewer pass over the WHOLE merged diff vs main (dual traceability intact, 0 engine-frozen diffs, no cross-increment regression via C-26 reverse census, every gate carry discharged) MUST come back clean; only then may the agent merge, then proceed to /dev-flow-sync. A HIGH finding BLOCKS the merge and returns to the operator. DECISION-RECORDING: every autonomous decision recorded in PLAN.md decision log + this decisions_log + 05-postmortem + carried to vault at sync. GUARDRAILS: full suite + engine-frozen guards + independent code-review GREEN before PR; snapshot regen canonical-CI-only (LOCAL REGEN FORBIDDEN); propose-not-encode new dev-flow controls (AskUserQuestion before encoding). PER-BATCH RULE (feedback_standing_auth_per_batch): batch-38-only; NEVER carried to batch-39; re-ask at next kickoff. Return to operator on: plan approval (the one gate), a HIGH final-QA finding, a genuine operator-only decision, or completion.
